title: EVERY CHILD PDX - 211info
text: THE CONTINGENT EVERY CHILD PDX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Recruits resource parents and provides various county-specific volunteer opportunities to support children and youth in foster care with their everyday needs. 809 N Russell Street #203 Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (800) 331-0503 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 331-0503 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete contact form or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - EVERY CHILD OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MY NEIGHBOR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE CONTINGENT
